criteriaResults.evidence: All 6 fields in PipelineSectionSchema with documented defaults.
resolveCheckpointMechanismName tier 5: mode→default (careful→disk, autopilot→noop). Explicit wins.
Tier 2 per-checkpoint override resolution verified by tests.
--checkpoint preserves overrides; --checkpoint-all clears them. Documented in help.
careful+noop warning at loader.ts:244; pr fallback at pr.ts:207; zod enum rejects unknown.
tests/integration/careful-flow.test.ts 2 tests pass; real DiskCheckpointMechanism + real .pending/.approved files + audit log assertion.
tests/config/graph-schema.test.ts new tests parse real bober.config.json with defaults; all 7 tests pass.

generatorFeedback.description: Audit mechanism label uses `config.pipeline?.checkpointMechanism ?? 'noop'` instead of calling resolveCheckpointMechanismName. With mode='careful' + unset checkpointMechanism, audit records 'noop' while actual mechanism instance is disk. Non-blocking: actual behavior is correct, only audit label is inaccurate. Recommended follow-up: replace with resolveCheckpointMechanismName(checkpointId, config) at both sites.

summary: All 8 criteria pass on iter 1. Tier 2 closed: schema, resolver, CLI flags, validation, integration test, backward-compat all green. One medium-priority quality follow-up: pipeline.ts uses simplified audit-mechanism label that diverges from resolveCheckpointMechanismName when mode='careful' + checkpointMechanism unset.
